title: Why aren't we clicking with Rankett — self-interrogation, Jan 11 2026
html:
TL;DR

  • A mid-week founder self-interrogation, written 4 days after the Jan 7 meetup and 9 days after the Diddles call. The note opens with the rawest founder question in the corpus:

    "Why aren't we clicking and feeling the fire with Rankett? Is it because you don't believe in it, or because you are lacking and pussy? Are you confused and paralyzed with trying to sort it out? Is this something that you see is truly viable? Should we bring someone else on board?"

  • Tonight stack: compile learnings from the meetup, get the slides + key findings, see how it relates to what he was already implementing, "seriously deeply consider Antonio Garcia tweet on this one" (the antonio garcia martinez startup voice he cites in 2023 07 05 startup advice agm), where are we with the portal, what remains to go live.
  • A separate disturbance: "what the hell is up with the moves desktop shit that happened" — a tooling/macOS Spaces issue.
  • The closing aphorisms are the clearest articulation of his founder-loneliness:

    "Be out in the cold and know no one is coming to save you. Lead and knowing that decisions and consequences fall on you. Ignorant about how hard it things can actually [be]. Seeing who can piss the farthest…"

Key quote

"Be out in the cold and know no one is coming to save you."

Why it matters in the graph

  • Most explicit founder-doubt note about Rankett. Pairs with 2026 01 13 rankett com ("Are there people out there rn that are truly pursuing this with all of their intention and soul?") — same week, same self-interrogation, twice.
  • "Should we bring someone else on board?" is a direct echo of the Cameron cofounder pitch from 4 years earlier — Yahir periodically wrestles with partnership vs solo.
  • The portal-needs-to-go-live task is the same portal mentioned in 2026 01 02 diddles call's "create an onboarding portal / stats" — confirms it's still in-progress mid-Jan.
  • no runway discipline / "no one is coming to save you" — the operating philosophy of Memory's self-funded-no-runway state in distilled form.

Open questions

  • Which Antonio Garcia Martinez tweet specifically? Worth searching.
  • Did the portal go live by end of January?
  • "Seeing who can piss the farthest" — competitive/playful framing of the founder game; an articulation worth bookmarking.
